Dialog.name: MSG_ARAGAKI_TARTAROS_090
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I haven't introduced myself, have I?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Name's Shinjiro Aragaki. I stayed here before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I won't bore you with all the details though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, long story short, I got your back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0903
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}There's going to be a full moon the day after tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure another large Shadow will appear, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please make sure you're fully prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0904
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Get geared up while you can. You know the drill. We'll be on standby at the dorm tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Heh, I'm all fired up... I don't care where or when it shows up—it's dead meat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0907
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Kirijo-senpai and the others are at the hospital and won't be back until later today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}From what I hear, that girl, Chidori, won't say anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe we should hold off on going to Tartarus until things are under control.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_0908
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}So, um... you've probably already seen the message I sent, but I have a favor to ask you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}This is just a hunch, but I think he's been feeling kinda down lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Could you check in on him when you have the time? He should be in his room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ARAGAKI_0909
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}How long have we been holding that Chidori girl?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_091
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Iori may be permitted to watch over that girl for the time being.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now's not the time to bombard her with questions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Besides, we still have three Shadows to contend with.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We should be able to accomplish that within the next few months, unless the situation changes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't let your guard down until the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0915
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I heard that Chidori-san is starting to open up a little...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}But it seems that she's still uncomfortable talking about Personas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It might take some time before she's ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0915
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We still have three Shadows to worry about, so let's focus on that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}They'll be sorry they ever set foot into this world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_091
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is it just my imagination, or have the Lost been proliferating more quickly than usual lately?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are over two weeks until the next full moon, so why...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I suppose we should just focus on what we can accomplish right now. We'll deal with this next Shadow swiftly and effectively.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HERO_0918
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a bit under the weather... Maybe[n]I should head to bed early tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_0924
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-san. Do you think we could head to Tartarus tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}There have been even more cases recently, so... I just want to be ready for anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please let me know if you plan on going tonight, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_0924
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-san. Any plans to go to Tartarus tonight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I want to get stronger... since there have been even more incidents and all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}We can go whenever you're free. Just please take me with you if you're going to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_OK_0924
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have you noticed that there have been more cases lately? I wish there was something I could do about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}But there's nothing I can do, is there? At least, not at this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0925
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}We'll be having another full moon soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}And since Chidori's getting better, I think I should start training again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Besides, those Apathy freaks are popping up everywhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_0929
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, have you been able to figure out why the machine in the command room is malfunctioning?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai asked me to take a look, but... I have no idea what's wrong with it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems to break down once a month around—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, don't worry, it doesn't affect our missions or anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0930
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's a good chance our next operation's gonna be on Sunday. We've got four days to prep, so don't slack, all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, I started a new workout routine last week specifically geared for combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0930
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}Hey, he ain't the only one starvin' for a fight. Just say the word, you can count on me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_093
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I appreciate the enthusiasm, but don't get yourself so worked up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
